gratitude: Bava(for taking to me the temple 😏😏)

reflection.reflect:
Had a really peaceful, good day…
Ending it with a happy heart… now waiting for what day 2 brings ✨

Today felt like a peaceful dream, me and bava woke up at 5 am and went for a morning jog…something wed never done before 🥹…watching the sunrise holding his hand it felt do calm🙇‍♀️…
Later i came home and my ammama scared me anxiety took over..thak god she was okay..after time passed i felt okay…
My work was surprisingly smooth no rush no stress…
We both we went to gym and went to cafe ..I really loved how we both sir and do our own works and yet feel connected 
After sooooo longgggg i felt peacefulllll…i felt so calm…A good day i want to remember 
I feel motivated on completing day 2 ..i see a bit consistency growing in me yayyy…i feel sooo happy ❤️
All thanks to my bava for inspiring me to start this 21 day challenge 
Yayyyy i loveeeee meee 🤭

gratitude: I’m grateful for god for having such a wonderful day

reflection.reflect:
I woke up at 5..we both maintained the streak and went to beach…had a pleasant morning… me and bava jogged for 2km and we both meditated ….I felt excited and happy throughout the day…bava made a suprise visit to my bank 🥳 I felt soooo happyyyyy….in the evening we both went to the gym and had a leg day😖…
We went to drive-in had good food…watched solo leveling😁…spent some good time together 😏…
then went to our spot and had a really nice time 🌝…
Later I went to Jagadamba for tablets, and it reminded me of my dad… I miss him❤️
Came back home, mom got angry because I didn’t have dinner 😅…Now I have to read my book🥲…
Thank you god for having such a good day…feeling excited for tomorrow…
I love my bava a lil more todayyyyyyyy🙇‍♀️❤️

entries.text:
Vasthundai peelings uuu
Vasthundai peelimgs uuu
Vachi vachi champesthunai peelings peelings uuuu

reflection.reflect:
Woke up at 5 am me and bava went to beach …the weather was so nice ..we had breakfast my bava took my my bite😏…had a hectic day at work 🫩…bava took me for lunch 😏…and later in the car things got intimate 🌝…we went to our second home(bnb)…spent some really good time…then we had dinner wrapped up the day…
Now I’m feeling tired, planning to sleep after reading the Gita and my book. I’m grateful to God for such a good day…
And my bava for all the motivation…without him i wouldn’t have been able to do this …

Started my day super energetic 💫 we ran a little longer today and it felt sooo good. Tried tea & coffee at a new place… funny moment…I only had 100 for a 140 bill 😂 paid him and now we owe 40… Asked bava for 100 and he gave 1000 😏 hope it’s always 10x like this hehe….later in the evening got a head massage with his money 🤭 had a great gym session too… Was a bit tensed all day thinking about leaving to Machilipatnam for training😭…we both went to our spot after the gym… Felt bad when he said he might smoke, but later he said he won’t because of God… that made me really happy ❤️ still wish he listened to me though😒😒😒😒….trw gng to gitam to pay feefor hani…felt lil tensed about money…need to be more financially disciplined…bava said he will help me 🥹… Honestly, what more can I ask God for… I’m lucky to have him 🥺 I just wish he knew how much I love him…
Thank you god for the wonderful and happy day 🙇‍♀️

Had such a beautiful start to the day 🤍 Morning felt calm and pleasan… loved the weather…. We went for our walk…keeping the streak alive…Then me, Hani, Dheeraj, and Bava went to gitam College for her admission and paid the fees. I missed my father a little… wished he was there. But I also felt strong and proud helping with the fee…
Later we all went for lunch and had goo vibe …bava took to simhachalamOne of my favorite days with Bava. I felt so attached and cared for… this is what love feels like at the right time 🤍…
The most special moment was doing abhishekam for Shivaya together 🛕 That stayed with me
Ended the day with lots of happiness

entries.text: Waiting for bava to go home

reflection.reflect:
Today felt very different… and a bit tough..
Woke up in the train and instantly missed my Morning …. and of course, my bava, amma, and chelli 🥹… Even though we’re far… we still meditated together 🤭 which felt nice…
Went to SBILD for training… honestly didn’t like the room.. it felt too congested. I was sleepy the whole day and just kept wishing these 3 days would pass fast….
Evening got better though… went shopping and my roommates turned out to be really good. Made some new friends ✨
Overall… just an okayish day
I missed my bavaaaaa sooo muchhh uahhh…
Thank you God for this day 🙏

entries.text: Excited to go to vizag yayyyyyy🥰

reflection.reflect:
Woke up feeling not at home and missed Amma a lot…still pushed myself to go for a job…got motivated by seeing bava’s msg…talked to bava…which made me miss him more and overthink a bit like how will i be once he leave🥲…but I calmed down….Felt sleepy in class and missed home throughout the day😭…Went shopping, skipped gym, had a good dinner…. I like the place and people, made some caring friends…waiting to go home…and see amma chelli bava ammamma…
Thank you god for this beautiful day❤️

entries.text: Excited to go to vizaggg yayy

reflection.reflect:
Woke up early went to the subramanya swamy temple felt really peaceful…. Visited a beautiful 14th-century temple, honestly felt like my dream place ✨
Came back…rested a bit.. then went shopping with friends in the evening. Excited about going home and meeting my family 🏡
. Also waiting for tomorrow to see bavaaa ❤️.😒… Ending the day feeling grateful… such a calm, beautiful day 🙏…

Woke up in the train and instantly felt excited 🤭…bava came to pick me up…we went to Sairam parlour for breakfast…I felt sooo happy seeing him after 3 days, I missed him a lot…Chelli hugged me as soon as she saw me 🥹, she was very happy…mom and Hani liked the gifts I bought…and again I felt excited to meet bava…we both had a really good time, watched Solo Leveling, then went to Max for shopping…I came back home and started reading a new book…again we both went to BND, then bava said he got scammed by a boy near Central and bought a fake iWatch 😭…I felt really bad for him, but he handled it veryy well…again came to BND, watched Solo Leveling and went back home…I feel a little bad for bava…uhhhh I feel like doing anything for him 🥺…lost the match 😭😭…now I shall sleep 💤

Had a realllyyyy good dayyy 🤍✨
Weather was sooo nice…we both went to the beach and just chilled…dark clouds beach and Bava beside me is literally unreal feeling 😭… I can’t even explain how happy I was
Then came home…went out with Amma & Hani for lunch…again beach 😂 loved the vibe we 3 had sooo much …
Evening gym with Bava was sooo good…after workout again beach hehe…had food there and tried hazelnut cold coffee for the first tim… sooo yummyyy 😭
Thunder in the sky…waves…Bava beside me…everything felt like a dream fr 🫶🏻✨ then we sat near a cafe and talked…
But I felt bad that I made Bava feel upset…even I didn’t like that…next time I’ll be better and won’t repeat it 🥺
Overall day ended sooo nice and peaceful 🤍✨
Thank you godd

Today just felt heavy from the start… the manager’s lectures in the morning completely shifted my mood and I couldn’t get back to feeling normal. The whole day I’ve been low..quiet…and not myself at all….I kept missing my dad so much…and that feeling just stayed with me. Nothing felt worth writing about, so I didn’t even feel like journaling. It was just one of those off days where everything feels dull. But even in this, I feel a little comfort knowing I have Bava who’s so kind and caring and that makes me feel a bit less alone

Woke up at 4 am …went for marathon…this is my first marathon ever in my life…I completed 5k narathon which gave me so much confidence never thought I could do…with out bava I couldn’t have done it …and then we booked bnb chilled there…went home and had a good massage at home…again-we both went to bnb and chilled…and then had an argument with amma … realized I need to control my anger better …that’s today lesson …missing my daddy a little more

Woke up in the morning and went for a walk…felt nice …i read my book and read manga too…😒😏…went to offuce it was a bus and hetic day as always… came home very late and in the end we both just chilled and had a good time in bnb…now im feeling very sleepy and feverish going to sleep now… overall it was a good and okayish day…excited for tomorrow yayyy….thanks to god for this day…gn

entries.text: Chilling with my baby at beach

reflection.reflect:
Woke up early went to the beach…jogged for about 2-2.5 km …than drank amla juice…meditated…i drank 3L of water…I’m thankful for hani for buying me that sipper…otherwise i wouldn’t have hydrated this much…office was actually good day…did nothing 🤣…read my book…played chess…and then took a nap…again read my book🤣🤣… One lady overreacted though…only negative part of the day 💀…gym felt different doing it all alone…first 5-10 was very hard for me…thinking this is how it will be once bava leaves…met bava after gym…he is sooooo cuteeeee …had good time…he ate half of my muri mixture 😒…with him it always feels like day 1 🥹😭…. Had an argument with mom and spoke harshly Felt really bad later, apologized to her Still guilty about it…
Ended the day reading Bhagavad Gita and feeling grateful to God

Wokeup early..pushed my limits and ran for 3km…my stamina improved felt so good…we both chilled for a bit and then meditated…felt sleepy all day…went to ofc read my book…i want to complete that book by this week…went to the gym and went to gluttons (bcz of bava😒😏) and came back home…kinda okaish day😒😏…feeling sleepy 😴

gratitude: Bava(for taking to me the temple 😏😏)
